product_overview: A web application for visually monitoring store locations and location-based data using maps and heatmaps, with user and store management and configurable application settings.
core_goals: Authenticate and access a personalized map view to explore location data and heatmaps
Search, add, edit, and remove stores and users to keep location and personnel data up to date
Inspect location markers and heatmap data interactively (zoom, pan, view location details)
Adjust and persist application settings to control behavior and presentation
Access an admin dashboard for global heatmap visualization and basic statistics

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in and out; client-side validation for login inputs.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in valid email and password -> Submit login form -> See /map as post-login landing view
Navigate to /login -> Submit empty login form -> See validation errors for required fields
Navigate to /login -> Fill in incorrect credentials -> Submit login form -> See authentication failure message
While authenticated on /map -> Perform logout action -> See /login as post-logout view

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Move between pages and confirm routes load correctly for the current user role.
user_flows: Navigate to /map -> Wait for page to load completely -> Navigate to /stores -> Wait for page to load completely -> Navigate to /admin -> Wait for page to load completely -> Navigate to /settings -> Wait for page to load completely
Navigate to /login -> Wait for page to load completely -> Navigate to /map after login -> Wait for page to load completely

features.name: Users Management
features.description: Search, create, update and delete user records from the admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Search for a user by name or email -> See matching users in the list
Navigate to /admin -> Add a new user with valid details -> Save the new user -> See the new user appear in the list
Navigate to /admin -> Add a new user with missing required fields -> Attempt to save -> See validation errors and remain on the add form
Navigate to /admin -> Select an existing user -> Update user details with valid changes -> Save changes -> See updated user details in the list
Navigate to /admin -> Select an existing user -> Delete the user -> See the user removed from the list

features.name: Stores Management
features.description: Manage store records: search, create, edit and remove stores used for heatmap and mapping.
user_flows: Navigate to /stores -> Search for a store by name or location -> See matching stores in the list
Navigate to /stores -> Add a new store with valid details -> Save the store -> See the new store appear in the list
Navigate to /stores -> Select an existing store -> Edit store details with valid changes -> Save changes -> See updated store details in the list
Navigate to /stores -> Select an existing store -> Delete the store -> See the store removed from the list

features.name: Map Interaction
features.description: Interact with the personal map: navigate, inspect markers and view heatmap layers.
user_flows: Navigate to /map -> Zoom in to a closer map scale -> Zoom out to a broader map scale -> Drag map to a different area -> View location data for a visible marker -> Observe heatmap overlay update to reflect the current view
Navigate to /map -> Drag map to focus on a cluster of markers -> View location data for markers in the area -> Confirm marker details surface correctly

features.name: Settings Update
features.description: Change application settings and verify that changes persist after reload.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Change one or more setting options -> Save settings -> Reload /settings -> Verify the changed options persist
Navigate to /settings -> Change a setting with invalid value -> Attempt to save -> See validation error and no change persisted

features.name: Admin Dashboard (Global Heatmap & Statistics)
features.description: View global heatmap and summary statistics from the admin dashboard to monitor location trends.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Observe global heatmap visualization and summary statistics on the dashboard
Navigate to /admin -> Use any provided dashboard controls to focus the heatmap (e.g., timeframe or area) -> Observe updated statistics and heatmap visualization

routes.description: Admin dashboard for user management and global heatmap
Personal map view and store tagging for User role

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Navigate between all application pages and verify routing
user_interactions: Wait for page to load completely without errors

features.name: Map Interaction
features.description: Ensure map, markers, and heatmap render and behave properly
